name: SAL.Gen_Bounded_Definite_Vectors

documentation.description:
As a special exception under Section 7 of GPL version 3, you are granted
additional permissions described in the GCC Runtime Library Exception,
version 3.1, as published by the Free Software Foundation.

simple_types.name: Vector
simple_types.code:
type Vector is private with
  Default_Initial_Condition => Length (Vector) = 0;

documentation.description:
Not 'tagged' because SPARK in Gnat Community 2019 does not support
type invariant on tagged type.

subtypes.name: Extended_Index

subprograms.code: function "&" (Left : in Vector; Right : in Element_Type) return Vector

subprograms.name: Append
subprograms.code: procedure Append (Container : in out Vector; New_Item : in Element_Type)

subprograms.name: Delete_First
subprograms.code: procedure Delete_First (Container : in out Vector; Count : in Ada.Containers.Count_Type := 1)

subprograms.name: Delete_Last
subprograms.code: procedure Delete_Last (Container : in out Vector; Count : in Ada.Containers.Count_Type := 1)

subprograms.name: Element
subprograms.code: function Element (Container : in Vector; Index : in Index_Type) return Element_Type

documentation.description: Index of first element in Vector is Index_Type'First.

subprograms.name: First_Index
subprograms.code: function First_Index (Container : in Vector) return Index_Type

subprograms.name: Has_Space
subprograms.code: function Has_Space (Container : in Vector; Item_Count : in Ada.Containers.Count_Type) return Boolean

subprograms.name: Insert

documentation.description:
Insert New_Item before Before, or after Last_Index if Before is
No_Index. Current elements at Before and after slide right.
New_Item then has index Before.

subprograms.name: Is_Full
subprograms.code: function Is_Full (Container : in Vector) return Boolean

subprograms.name: Last_Index
subprograms.code: function Last_Index (Container : in Vector) return Extended_Index

subprograms.name: Length
subprograms.code: function Length (Container : in Vector) return Ada.Containers.Count_Type

subprograms.name: Prepend
subprograms.code: procedure Prepend (Container : in out Vector; New_Item : in Element_Type)

documentation.description: Insert New_Item at beginning of Container; current elements slide right.

subprograms.name: Replace_Element

documentation.description: Index of first element in Vector is Index_Type'First.

subprograms.name: To_Vector
subprograms.code: function To_Vector (Element : in Element_Type) return Vector
